attributes.name: [Azure Application Gateway OTel] Gateway availability 99.5% rolling 30 days
attributes.description: This SLO tracks gateway-boundary availability for Azure Application Gateway via OTel access logs. A request is counted as good when the HTTP status code returned to the client is below 500 (i.e. the gateway did not return a 5xx). The objective is that at least 99.5% of requests are served successfully over a rolling 30-day window. Sustained breaches indicate AGW-side failures (no healthy backend, WAF block, gateway capacity issues) or backend incidents surfaced through the gateway.
